SELECT abs(value) AS absolute_value FROM test_abs WHERE absolute_value > 5;
CREATE TABLE test_join (id INT, val INT);
SELECT t1.id, abs(t1.val) FROM test_abs AS t1 JOIN test_join AS t2 ON abs(t1.value) = abs(t2.val);
SELECT id, abs(val) AS positive_value FROM test_join WHERE val < -5 ORDER BY positive_value;
WITH (SELECT SUM(abs(value)) FROM test_abs) AS total_abs SELECT total_abs / COUNT(*) FROM test_abs;
SELECT arrayMap(x -> abs(x), nested_value) FROM nested_abs;
SELECT abs((SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_abs)) AS total_abs_value FROM test_abs;
